text.title: Cloudflare Domain + DNS Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `Cloudflare Domain + DNS` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Cloudflare SSL mode MUST be Full (Strict). Never Flexible, never plain Full, never Off. Wrong mode = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Flexible terminates TLS at edge and re-issues HTTP to origin; nginx 301s back to HTTPS; infinite loop, ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS within 10 hops.

rule.statement: On dual-stack origins, A and AAAA MUST be added together. AAAA-without-A or A-without-AAAA on dual-stack origin = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Browsers prefer IPv6; a stale or missing AAAA leads to intermittent failures from IPv6 clients while IPv4 users see no problem — hardest 'works for me' bug.

rule.statement: Every record MUST have an explicit proxy decision (orange/gray) with rationale in the record comment. Default-orange-everywhere is rejected.
rule.rationale: Mail subdomains MUST stay gray (Cloudflare proxy is HTTP-only); raw TCP/UDP services MUST stay gray; HTTPS services SHOULD be orange. Per-record decision avoids broken mail or hidden origin IP leaks.

rule.statement: Cloudflare account MUST have 2FA enabled (TOTP / WebAuthn) AND auto-renew enabled AND billing email monitored. Missing any = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Domain hijacking and accidental expiry are catastrophic and silent. Cloudflare enables most defaults but billing drift can silently break auto-renew.

rule.statement: Propagation MUST be verified from at least 2 external resolvers (1.1.1.1 + 8.8.8.8) and from at least 1 second network (mobile / VPN). Single-resolver checks = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Local resolver cache or split-horizon can hide stale NS for hours; multi-resolver + multi-network confirms global propagation.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume cycles and produce false confidence.
